title: ayushania calthifolia
intro: Ayushania calthifolia, also known as the Himalayan jumping betty, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Ayushania calthifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Ayushania calthifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make various formulations, including capsules, tablets, and ointments.
